rationale: The provided notes show a strong topical/method mismatch: the citing paper is about cross-cultural mass-customization interface design and interface fluency (experiments/field tests), while the cited paper is a scanner-panel dynamic SKU choice-map modeling study. The matched evidence includes only a DOI-level reference entry with no in-text context or indication that this model/theory is used, so this looks like an incidental/background citation rather than a substantive dependency.
